vision.statement: Africa-focused founder command center — capital desk, growth desk, and visibility desk productized from the GTCX fundraising engine

mission: Ship Venture OS MVP app + collateral workflows so GTCX ecosystem repos are the first pilot clients with demoable founder journeys

northStarMetric.name: Pilot founder journey completion
northStarMetric.target: One end-to-end intake → collateral → visibility witness per pilot client

productGoals.title: Founder command center MVP
productGoals.outcome: Next.js app routes green for intake, operations, collateral, visibility

productGoals.title: GTCX ecosystem pilot profiles
productGoals.outcome: Ecosystem repos modeled as first venture pilot clients
productGoals.measure: Client schema validated + 1 pilot journey witness

productGoals.title: Governed fundraising workflows
productGoals.outcome: Human-gated external sends with agent prep
productGoals.measure: No autonomous external outreach; culture check PASS

gtmGoals.title: Ecosystem-first pilot
gtmGoals.outcome: GTCX repos as first venture profiles with demo routes

activeMilestone.title: Venture OS MVP + GTCX pilot shell
activeMilestone.shippableOutcome: Next.js app routes green (lint/build); product-goals + PRD indexed; pilot client schema validated
